title: MindPulse - Digital Cognitive Assessment
problem: Cognitive assessment is time-consuming and requires specialist administration. Early detection of cognitive decline is difficult.
solution: Digital cognitive assessment tool for detecting cognitive impairment, used in primary care and specialist settings.
technology: Digital assessment, normative data, scoring algorithms
varden_fit: Moderate — cognitive screening could be valuable add-on for Varden's primary care partners.
notes: Digital cognitive assessment. Relevant for aging population.
